16:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Tiered Episodic Degradation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne (since v2.3) supports three-tier degradation so episodic memories persist indefinitely without bloat. Old memories never get deleted, they gracefully fade into compact, lower-priority signals that still surface when the query really matters."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Tier Definitions"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Tier 1 (hot, 0 to 30 days):"}]," Full detail, 1.0x recall weight. These are your working, active memories."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Tier 2 (warm, 30 to 180 days):"}]," LLM-compressed summary, roughly 400 characters. Half the recall weight."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Tier 3 (cold, 180+ days):"}]," Entity-extracted signal, roughly 200 to 300 characters. Quarter the recall weight."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"The Degradation Flow"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-mermaid","children":"flowchart LR\n    T1[Tier 1: Full Detail] -->|30+ days, LLM compress| T2[Tier 2: Summary ~400 chars]\n    T2 -->|180+ days, entity extract| T3[Tier 3: Key Signal ~250 chars]\n    T3 -.->|\"4x stronger match needed\"| Recall[Recall Engine]\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How It Works"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Degradation runs automatically at the end of each ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]," cycle, right after consolidation completes. No separate cron jobs, no manual pruning."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Tier 1 to Tier 2"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Memories older than the configured threshold (default 30 days) get compressed by a local LLM into a roughly 400-character summary. If no LLM is available, the system falls back to keeping the raw text so nothing is lost."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Tier 2 to Tier 3"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Memories older than 180 days undergo deep signal extraction via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"_extract_key_signal()"}],". Instead of naive first-N-characters trimming, this function scores every sentence by entity density: proper nouns, acronyms, security terms, tech stack keywords, and urgency markers. It keeps the highest-scoring sentences until the character budget is full. A memory where the critical fact is buried in the last sentence preserves that sentence instead of only the boring first one."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Recall Weight Multipliers"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Tier 3 memories need roughly 4x stronger semantic match to surface compared to Tier 1"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Tier 2 memories need roughly 2x stronger match"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Old memories stay out of your way unless the query is genuinely relevant"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Configuration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"All knobs are environment variables:"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_DAYS=30        # Days before tier 1 -> 2\nMNEMOSYNE_TIER3_DAYS=180       # Days before tier 2 -> 3\nMNEMOSYNE_TIER1_WEIGHT=1.0     # Recall multiplier for tier 1\nMNEMOSYNE_TIER2_WEIGHT=0.5     # Recall multiplier for tier 2\nMNEMOSYNE_TIER3_WEIGHT=0.25    # Recall multiplier for tier 3\nMNEMOSYNE_DEGRADE_BATCH=100    # Max rows per cycle\nMNEMOSYNE_SMART_COMPRESS=1     # Enable entity-aware extraction\nMNEMOSYNE_TIER3_MAX_CHARS=300  # Max chars for tier 3\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Python API"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"default\")\n\n# Run degradation manually\nresult = mem.degrade_episodic()\nprint(result)  # {\"tier1_to_tier2\": 5, \"tier2_to_tier3\": 12}\n\n# Dry run to preview\ndry = mem.degrade_episodic(dry_run=True)\n\n# During sleep, degradation runs automatically\nresult = mem.sleep()\nprint(result[\"degradation\"])  # {\"tier1_to_tier2\": 3, \"tier2_to_tier3\": 8}\n"}]}],"\n","$L3","\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12"],["$L13"],"$L14"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"3kcwGJ9M0GngJg8dJY_0p"}
3:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Design Intent"}]
4:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Marketing truth:"}]," \"Mnemosyne remembers what I told it a year ago.\" Tier 3 memories are still queryable, just at reduced priority."]}]
5:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Engineering reality:"}]," Cold memories do not clutter everyday context. They only surface with very strong semantic matches."]}]
6:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Zero maintenance:"}]," No manual pruning scripts, no cron jobs. The system degrades itself during sleep cycles."]}]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Backward compatible:"}]," Existing databases work without migration. Old rows default to Tier 1."]}]
8:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Smart Compression Detail"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"_extract_key_signal()"}]," function scores every sentence by signal density:"]}]
a:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Acronyms"}]," (XKCD, API, AWS): +3"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Known tech terms"}]," (Docker, Python, Rust): +4"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Security terms"}]," (password, token, encrypt): +3"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Infrastructure terms"}]," (production, deploy, database): +2"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Urgency signals"}]," (critical, breaking, incident): +3"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Preference markers"}]," (prefers, uses, likes): +2"]}],"\n"]}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":"Sentences are ranked by total score, top scorers kept until character budget is exhausted. A critical security finding in the final paragraph gets preserved, not truncated."}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Why not just first N characters?"}]," Naive truncation assumes importance lives at the top. Real conversations bury critical facts deep. Smart compression finds the signal no matter where it hides."]}]
d:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Sleep Integration"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"degrade_episodic()"}]," runs at the end of both ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep_all_sessions()"}],", after consolidation. Stats included under the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"degradation\""}]," key."]}]
f:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How It Compares"}]
10:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"vs Vector DB TTL:"}]," Automatic degradation vs manual cleanup. No data loss vs hard deletion after expiry."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"vs Full-text pruning:"}]," Smart entity-aware extraction vs naive first-N-characters. Critical sentences survive."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"vs Archive-only approaches:"}]," Tier 3 remains queryable at reduced weight vs moved to cold storage, unsearchable."]}],"\n"]}]
11:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Related"}]
12:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","a",null,{"href":"/architecture/sleep-consolidation","children":"Sleep Consolidation"}]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","a",null,{"href":"/architecture/aaak-compression","children":"AAAK Compression"}]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","a",null,{"href":"/architecture/data-flow","children":"Data Flow"}]}],"\n"]}]
13:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0a4uvox5u-8r1.js","async":true}]
14:["$","$L15",null,{"children":["$","$16",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@17"}]}]
